summary: thesis get/search, generic live search, and the corpus/analytics commands use a hand-authored internal/dspace HTML client for structured extraction.
reason: Shodhganga exposes no OAI/REST/OpenSearch API; the generated JSON client silently discarded HTML search responses, and html_extract 'page' mode only captured item titles and nav links instead of DC.* metadata. internal/dspace parses those pages into typed search hits and thesis records; harvest pages respect the requested limit, and thesis freshness hints point back to harvest. The university 'list' endpoint (/community-list, a 900+-university mega-page that hangs) was removed from the spec.
validated_outcome: shipcheck 7/7 PASS, scorecard 88/100 Grade A, full live dogfood 90/90 at 120s timeout; after review repair, 794 Go tests, go vet/build, govulncheck, skill verification, and publish-package verification pass.
